intro: It seems {{pokemon1}} and {{pokemon2}} are causing trouble! It might resolve itself more quickly if you help one or the other.
title: Legendary Conflict
description: {{pokemon1}} and {{pokemon2}} are locked in battle. The one you help must survive if you want its blessing.

1.label: Help {{pokemon1}}
1.tooltip: (+) Earn a permanent {{blessing1}} blessing if {{pokemon1}} survives

2.label: Help {{pokemon2}}
2.tooltip: (+) Earn a permanent {{blessing2}} blessing if {{pokemon2}} survives

3.label: Not my problem!
3.selected: You leave the conflict to resolve itself.

outro.success: The surviving legendary acknowledges your help. Its {{blessing}} blessing will follow you.
outro.failed: The conflict ends, but the legendary you chose to help could not stay standing.
